input: Daily standup: Alex finished the auth module. Bai is working on the API integration. Chen is blocked waiting for design specs. No decisions needed — just progress updates.
output_rubric: Should decline to classify or state that decision state analysis does not apply to routine standups. Should not force a classification on a progress-update meeting.
evidence: Boundary case. Daily standups are explicitly excluded by ax-discussion-not-decision does_not_apply_when.
